name: ApertureDB
description: ApertureDB — Multi-modal database combining vector search with image, video, and metadata storage for ML workflows.

seo.title: ApertureDB — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: ApertureDB: ApertureDB — Multi-modal database combining vector search with image, video, and metadata storage for ML workflows.

when_to_use: Storing image embeddings alongside raw frames in one query
Building reverse image search over millions of product photos
Running similarity search on video frames for media analysis
Combining metadata filters with vector search for ML datasets

pros: Native multi-modal storage for images and vectors
Query language spans metadata and similarity
cons: Smaller community than Pinecone or Weaviate
review.verdict: Useful when vectors, blobs, and metadata must live together; overkill for text-only RAG.
review.best_for: CV and multimodal ML teams managing image, video, and embedding datasets
review.not_for: Simple text-only RAG projects where Pinecone or pgvector suffice
